rationale: This is a Dependabot security-group bump touching only poetry.lock to bump authlib (1.6.9 to 1.6.12, addressing OIDC redirect_uri validation in OpenIDImplicitGrant/OpenIDHybridGrant and CSRF in starlette client), poetry (2.3.3 to 2.3.4, fixing a path traversal in sdist extraction), and nbconvert (7.17.0 to 7.17.1, two CVE fixes). The lockfile generator comment is also bumped from 'Poetry 2.3.3' to 'Poetry 2.4.1'. Only hashes/version strings change; no source code is touched and no test or assertion is weakened, so this is a clean dependency-security update.
